response.justification: The candidate is an experienced, versatile engineer, but their profile does not match this role's core requirements. Professional C++ exposure is limited to a ~7-month stint at National Instruments in 2014–2015 plus a thesis project, far short of the mandatory 5–10 years of hands-on Windows C++ development. There is no SQL Server/Oracle experience listed (MongoDB/MySQL only), and no fixed income, derivatives, or capital markets domain background — RIDE Capital was a Node/TypeScript fintech role, not investment banking. Strengths in TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and testing culture are not transferable enough to offset the missing mandatory skills.
strengths: Broad, long-tenured engineering career spanning web, desktop, and embedded systems
Strong low-latency/high-throughput systems experience (millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Solid engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, pairing, open-source contributions
concerns: Only ~7 months of professional C++ experience, and not on the required Windows/financial-systems stack
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; database background is MongoDB/MySQL
No fixed income, derivatives, or capital markets / investment banking domain knowledge

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain
Strong general engineering and performance systems background
